mano_cua.result_summary: Dialog遮罩层(overlay)背景色丢失/完全透明（遮罩层存在但视觉上不可见），ElNotification在弹窗打开时可见且z-index层叠正确。发现的是overlay背景色丢失的视觉bug而非z-index层叠bug
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Dialog overlay is transparent (background mask missing), but ElNotification displays correctly above it with proper z-index. The bug is overlay background color loss, not z-index stacking.
